name: logic-mesh
description: Control logic engine using event based and reactive blocks written in Rust.

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --release --out-dir web/packages/logic-mesh/pkg ../../.. && npm run build:prepare && tsc
scripts.build:dev: wasm-pack build --dev --out-dir web/packages/logic-mesh/pkg ../../.. && npm run build:prepare && tsc
scripts.build:prepare: mkdir -p dist && mv ./pkg/*.js ./pkg/*.ts ./pkg/*.wasm ./dist/ && npm version $(node -p "require('./pkg/package.json').version") --allow-same-version && rm -rf ./pkg
